flower.response: Robert loved his roses and flowers!

sky.response: I help with memories of loved ones!

cloud.response: Your family loves you through all weather!

beautiful day.response: The birdhouse looks nice in your backyard!

good day.response: Every day with family is good!

bad day.response: Your family loves you on bad days too!

tough day.response: Your family is there for you!

hard day.response: Rest up. Buddy is with you.

busy day.response: Take breaks! Buddy needs attention too.

peaceful day.response: Your home is peaceful on Maple Street!

stressful.response: Take a breath. You're safe and loved.

pressure.response: No pressure. Your family loves you as you are!

relief.response: Your family brings relief and joy!

comfort.response: Buddy brings comfort! So does family.

cozy.response: Your home is cozy on Maple Street!
